programmes.show_description: (2021) Dark, tense thriller with Oscar Isaac and Tiffany Haddish. An ex-con-turned-professional-gambler is tempted to reject his strict routine and seek revenge for his military past.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1960) Adventure with Richard Greene, Peter Cushing and a young Oliver Reed. Can Robin Hood foil the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham's evil plan to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury?
(1989) Comedy-thriller starring Tom Hanks. A cop investigates a murder to which there's just one witness: Hooch, a slobbering, beer-drinking French mastiff, who now needs 24/7 protection.
(1957) Classic sci-fi horror about the perils of radiation. A normal-sized fella gets a lot, lot smaller when he breathes in a mysterious mist. Definitely not one for arachnophobes!

programmes.show_name: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programmes.show_description: (1959) Fantasy adventure starring James Mason, Pat Boone and Diane Baker. An expedition to the centre of the planet unexpectedly encounters a villainous rival and prehistoric beasts.
(2022) Poignant road-trip comedy with Channing Tatum. A soldier with PTSD must escort a traumatised army canine to a comrade's funeral. Can man and dog save each other's lives?
(2023) Sci-fi action adventure starring Adam Driver as a spaceman who crash-lands on a strange planet where giant lizards stalk the darkness... 65 million years ago.
(2020) Potential disaster-in-the-skies thriller with Allison Williams and Alexander Dreymon. A couple must fly their small plane to safety when the pilot dies. Easy, right?

programmes.show_name: My Heart Can't Beat Unless You...
programmes.show_description: ...Tell it To: (2020) Gritty twist on the vampire trope. A sickly young vampire's brother doesn't want to kill for him any more. But as their sister says, do they really have any choice?
(2022) Eerie sci-fi horror-thriller with Maika Monroe and Jake Lacy. Extra-terrestrial forces derail a couple's romantic backpacking trip, but in a subtle, non-spaceship kind of a way.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1947) Supernatural romance starring Rex Harrison as the spirit of a gruff sea captain who haunts widow Gene Tierney, only for her to fall in love with him. Directed by Joseph L Mankiewicz.
(2006) Spooky animated caper with Maggie Gyllenhaal and Steve Buscemi. A young boy and his babysitter spy on the creepy neighbour. Did he really eat his wife?

programmes.show_name: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programmes.show_description: (1961) Sci-fi adventure starring Walter Pidgeon. Earth faces a fiery death when a meteor shower triggers a natural disaster. Can the commander of a nuclear submarine save us all?
(1992) Comedy starring Whoopi Goldberg. A casino singer who witnesses a Mob murder goes into hiding at a convent, where she soon has the choir rocking. With Maggie Smith.
(1997) Sci-fi comedy. Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star as top-secret agents who monitor and hush up the presence of aliens on Earth - and discover one scary critter's deadly plot.
(1999) Drama with Tom Hanks and Michael Clarke Duncan. Strange events occur when a man convicted of raping and murdering two young girls arrives on death row in a Louisiana prison.
